summary: RETEST of iteration_2 issues — BOTH FIXED. (1) GET /api/v1/analytics/overview now returns deterministic detection_trend_7d computed from db.alerts windowed counts AND includes detections_last_7d + detections_prev_7d. Two back-to-back calls returned identical {detection_trend_7d:100.0, detections_last_7d:25, detections_prev_7d:0}. With prev7=0 and last7>0 the code branches to 100.0 (sensible fallback for cold-start). Pytest test_overview_real_trend_and_window_fields now PASSES (was the only failing test in iter 2). Full backend suite: 34/34 passing. (2) Desktop side-nav (desk-sidenav, 260px) now PERSISTS on all top-level routes /detections, /analytics, /users, /audit, /settings — verified via Playwright at 1440x900: clicked nav-analytics → nav-users → nav-audit → nav-settings → nav-detections in sequence, desk-sidenav remained visible throughout and the corresponding nav-* row received the indigo active bar + highlighted background. User pill (sidenav-userpill) shows 'ADMIN · LIVE' with cyan dot indicating live websocket. Screenshot confirms 'Detections' row is highlighted with cyan left bar while on /detections.

minor.issue: Still returns single hard-coded 'system.start' item — flagged in iter 2, not in scope for this retest.
Still uses random.uniform(0.6,0.85) for known/unknown split — flagged in iter 2.
Still returns static array — flagged in iter 2.

issues: A back-arrow header (←) is still rendered above /detections, /analytics, /users, /audit, /settings even on desktop where the side-nav is the primary navigation. This is redundant on desktop ≥1024 — consider hiding the Stack header when DesktopShell is active (headerShown:false on desktop). Minor UX polish, not blocking.

action_items: (Optional polish) Hide the Stack screen header on /detections, /analytics, /users, /audit, /settings when width >= 1024 — currently a back-arrow header sits above the content even though DesktopShell already provides global navigation.

(Carried from iter 2, not in this retest scope) Replace /audit single-item stub with a real audit log collection; persist known/unknown counts for detection-status-trends; back object-stats with real DB aggregations.
critical_code_review_comments: analytics_overview now correctly aggregates db.alerts windows (now-7d vs now-14d..now-7d) and exposes detections_last_7d/detections_prev_7d. Fallback logic is sensible: prev7=0 & last7>0 → 100.0; both 0 → 0.0; else round((last-prev)/prev*100, 1).

DesktopShell.tsx is a clean shared layout — renders only when width>=Breakpoint.desktop AND user is authenticated, so login/boot screens still render full-bleed. Uses useSegments() to derive currentPath and computes isActive() correctly for both /(tabs) and root-level hrefs. Active-bar absolute-positioned with left:-Space.md to overflow the row padding — looks good.
app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx no longer renders SideNav (good, removes duplication) and hides the bottom tab-bar on desktop via tabBarStyle:{display:'none'} when width>=Breakpoint.desktop.
server.py still 1007 lines — should be split into routers (auth/analytics/cameras/alerts/users/settings/ws) as flagged previously.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 2 retested flows (analytics determinism via API + side-nav persistence across all 5 top-level routes)

test_credentials: admin@visionaryx.dev / VisionX2025! and operator@visionaryx.dev / Operator2025! — verified working.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data this iteration. Previous iter 2 settings doc (smtp.example.dev:2525) may still be present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter 2 blockers are RESOLVED. Backend pytest suite (34 tests) at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run: `python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --asyncio-mode=auto`. Desktop side-nav now wraps EVERY authenticated route via /app/frontend/components/DesktopShell.tsx mounted from /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx (not just (tabs) anymore). Test-id `desk-sidenav` confirmed visible on /detections, /analytics, /users, /audit, /settings at 1440x900. Remaining minor items (audit stub, status-trends randomness, object-stats static, back-arrow header redundancy on desktop) are pre-existing and were flagged in iter 2.
rca of the issue: iter_2 RCAs are both addressed in iter_3: (a) analytics_overview now computes real windowed counts from db.alerts using last7_start=now-7d and prev14_start=now-14d, with proper branching when prev7==0. Determinism verified by two back-to-back calls returning identical values. (b) DesktopShell layout component is mounted at the root in app/_layout.tsx, so it wraps the Stack — every route (tabs + top-level) inherits the 260px side-nav on width>=1024.
